description: Official TeachAny courseware registry - 9 demo coursewares for Skill reference (Math×2, Biology, History, Physics, Geography, Chemistry×2, Chinese, IB DP Chemistry)

courses.name: 二次函数 y=ax²+bx+c
courses.subject: math
courses.description: Complete interactive courseware for quadratic functions. Canvas graphing, vertex dragging, step-by-step completing the square, and per-option error diagnosis.
courses.description_zh: 九年级上册二次函数完整互动课件。Canvas 绘图、顶点拖拽、配方法逐步推导、逐选项错因诊断。
courses.author: weponusa

courses.name: 一次函数
courses.subject: math
courses.description: Grade 8 linear function courseware with Canvas graphing, k/b sliders, step-by-step undetermined coefficient method, three-level scaffolding, and 4 TTS narration segments.
courses.description_zh: 八年级一次函数互动课件。Canvas 绘图、k/b 滑块实时探索、待定系数法逐步推导、三级脚手架练习、4 段 TTS 语音讲解。
courses.author: weponusa

courses.name: 光合作用
courses.subject: biology
courses.description: Interactive Grade 7 Biology courseware on photosynthesis. Canvas animation, drag-and-drop equation building, chloroplast structure labeling. 12 AI narration segments with subtitles.
courses.description_zh: 七年级生物互动课件，涵盖光合作用定义、方程式、三大条件、叶绿体结构，Canvas 动画 + 拖拽排序 + 12 段 TTS 语音讲解。
courses.author: weponusa

courses.name: 秦汉统一多民族国家
courses.subject: history
courses.description: Interactive courseware for Qin-Han unification. MapLibre historical map, SVG life scenes, Canvas experiments, D3.js knowledge graph, and comprehensive quizzes.
courses.description_zh: 七年级上册第3单元秦汉大一统互动课件。MapLibre 历史地图、SVG 生活场景、Canvas 实验、D3.js 知识图谱、完整练习题。
courses.author: TeachAny

courses.name: 压强
courses.subject: physics
courses.description: Grade 8 physics: solid pressure (p=F/S), liquid pressure (p=ρgh), communicating vessels. 3 Canvas experiments with HiDPI, 14 diagnostic quiz questions.
courses.description_zh: 八年级物理压强互动课件。固体压强p=F/S、液体压强p=ρgh、连通器原理。3个Canvas交互实验，14道诊断式测评。
courses.author: weponusa

courses.name: 全球季风系统
courses.subject: geography
courses.description: Explore monsoon systems on an interactive Leaflet map. Wind pattern visualization, summer/winter toggle, East Asian vs. South Asian monsoon comparison.
courses.description_zh: 在交互式 Leaflet 地图上探索季风系统。风向可视化、夏冬切换、东亚与南亚季风对比。
courses.author: weponusa

courses.name: 元素周期表
courses.subject: chemistry
courses.description: Grade 9 chemistry interactive courseware. Interactive periodic table, period/group navigation, same-group similarity, same-period trends, property prediction with three-level scaffolding.
courses.description_zh: 九年级化学互动课件。交互式元素周期表、周期与族定位、同族相似与同周期递变、性质预测三级脚手架练习、4 段 TTS 语音讲解。
courses.author: weponusa

courses.name: 复韵母乐园
courses.subject: chinese
courses.description: Grade 1 Chinese Pinyin courseware on compound vowels (ai/ei/ui/ao/ou/iu/ie/üe/er). Interactive learning with games and pronunciation exercises.
courses.description_zh: 一年级语文拼音课件,涵盖复韵母ai/ei/ui/ao/ou/iu/ie/üe/er的发音与书写,通过互动游戏和练习帮助学生掌握复韵母。
courses.author: weponusa

courses.name: 氧化还原反应
courses.subject: chemistry
courses.description: High school chemistry courseware on oxidation-reduction reactions. Features Canvas electron transfer animation, ABT narrative, valence change game, layered exercises (Level 1-3), and pre/post-test with auto-scoring.
courses.description_zh: 高中化学必修一氧化还原反应互动课件。含 Canvas 电子转移动画、ABT 叙事导入、化合价判断游戏、分层练习（含歧化反应）、前后测自动评分。
courses.author: weponusa

courses.name: 朝花夕拾 · 名著导读
courses.subject: chinese
courses.description: Interactive courseware for Lu Xun's only memoir essay collection — dual-perspective reading method.
courses.description_zh: 初中七年级语文名著导读：朝花夕拾 — 十篇散文速览、人物画廊、核心手法、双视角叙事、批注实战
courses.author: weponusa

courses.name: 三国两晋南北朝至隋唐
courses.name_en: Three Kingdoms, Jin, Southern & Northern Dynasties to Sui-Tang
courses.subject: history
courses.description: Interactive courseware on the critical transition from Three Kingdoms to Sui-Tang. Timeline-based thematic approach with causal chain analysis.
courses.description_zh: 初中历史主题型互动课件：三国两晋南北朝至隋唐 — 朝代更替时间线拖拽排序、隋统一条件分析、贞观之治内容、史料分析题
courses.author: weponusa

courses.title: There be 句型
courses.subject: english
courses.description: 小学英语 There be 句型互动课件，涵盖 there is/are 用法、肯定否定疑问句变换、方位介词搭配等核心知识点。

courses.title: 英国资产阶级革命
courses.subject: history
courses.name: 英国资产阶级革命 - TeachAny 互动课件
周期表与周期性趋势
courses.subject: chemistry
courses.description: IB DP Chemistry SL/HL — Structure 3.1-3.3. Explore the structure of the periodic table and explain periodic trends (atomic radius, ionization energy, electronegativity, ionic radius, electron affinity) using electron configuration and effective nuclear charge.
courses.description_zh: IB DP化学SL/HL互动课件：周期表结构与周期性趋势（原子半径、电离能、电负性、离子半径、电子亲和能），含有效核电荷解释。
courses.author: weponusa

courses.name: 工业革命
courses.subject: history
courses.description: Middle school history: The Industrial Revolution (1760s-1850s), learning causes, key inventions, social impacts and dual consequences through ABT intro, interactive exploration, timeline sorting, and source analysis.
courses.description_zh: 初中历史（初二·初三）：工业革命完整互动课件。ABT叙事导入、英国为何首发五因素分析、关键发明互动探索、时间线拖拽排序、史料研读、双重影响评价。
courses.author: weponusa

courses.name: 隋唐至明清政治制度演变
courses.name_en: Political System Evolution: Sui-Tang to Ming-Qing
courses.subject: history
courses.description: Interactive courseware for High School History: Political System Evolution from Sui-Tang to Ming-Qing dynasties
courses.description_zh: 高中历史互动课件：隋唐至明清政治制度演变。涵盖两条主线（中央集权与君主专制）、三省六部制流程、宋元明清制度变革、选官制度演变，通过双线并行时间轴、交互流程图、拖拽排序、自适应分支等深度互动组件，构建完整的政治制度知识体系。
courses.author: weponusa

courses.name: 简单电路
courses.subject: science
courses.description: 小学科学四年级「简单电路」互动课件。包含四个电路元件认识、通路/断路演示动画、Canvas 拖拽拼接电路、知识测验，融合 Edge-TTS 语音讲解和 Remotion 程序化动画。
courses.author: teachany

courses.name: 古诗里的秘密节奏——《小池》与《池上》
courses.name_en: Secret Rhythm in Classical Poetry: Xiaochi & Chishang
courses.subject: chinese
courses.description: Grade 1 Chinese: Use two classical poems 'Xiaochi' and 'Chishang' to introduce tonal rhythm rules (平仄). Review four tones, learn the level-oblique distinction (1st/2nd tone = level, 3rd/4th = oblique), discover the rhythm patterns of 5-character and 7-character quatrains.
courses.description_zh: 一年级语文：通过《小池》和《池上》两首古诗，启蒙平仄规律认知。复习四声，认识平仄（一二声=平，三四声=仄），发现五言绝句和七言绝句的平仄规律，培养古诗节奏感。
courses.author: weponusa

courses.name: 丝绸之路与东西方交流
courses.subject: history
courses.description: Explore how the Silk Road connected ancient China with the world.
courses.description_zh: 探索丝绸之路如何连接古代中国与世界，促进东西方文化与经济交流。
courses.author: TeachAny

courses.name: 宋代科技与社会生活
courses.name_en: Song Dynasty Technology and Social Life
courses.subject: history
courses.description: Discover Song Dynasty's technological innovations and their global impact.
courses.description_zh: 了解宋代四大发明的发展及其对人类文明的影响，以及宋代繁荣的社会生活。
courses.author: TeachAny

courses.name: 蒙古崛起与元朝统一
courses.name_en: Mongol Rise and Yuan Dynasty Unification
courses.subject: history
courses.description: Explore the rise of the Mongol Empire and the establishment of the Yuan Dynasty.
courses.description_zh: 了解蒙古族的兴起，知道元朝统一全国的历史意义及民族融合。
courses.author: TeachAny

courses.name: 亚非拉民族解放运动
courses.subject: history
courses.description: Understand the collapse of colonial empires after WWII and the rise of new nations.
courses.description_zh: 了解二战后亚非拉民族独立运动的主要史实，认识殖民体系崩溃的历史意义。
courses.author: TeachAny

courses.name: 改革开放与中国特色社会主义
courses.name_en: Reform and Opening Up and Socialism with Chinese Characteristics
courses.subject: history
courses.description: Explore how Reform and Opening Up transformed China's economy and society.
courses.description_zh: 了解家庭联产承包责任制、国有企业改革和经济特区的建立，理解改革开放的历史意义。
courses.author: TeachAny

courses.name: 隋唐制度与盛世
courses.subject: history
courses.description: Discover how Sui-Tang institutions shaped Chinese civilization for a thousand years.
courses.description_zh: 了解隋朝统一、科举制度的创立及唐朝的繁荣，认识隋唐制度创新的历史意义。
courses.author: TeachAny

courses.name: 明清经济发展与对外关系
courses.name_en: Ming-Qing Economic Development and Foreign Relations
courses.subject: history
courses.description: Explore the paradox of Ming-Qing China: leading in trade yet declining in global power.
courses.description_zh: 了解郑和下西洋、明清商品经济发展与闭关锁国政策，理解明清由盛转衰的历史根源。
courses.author: TeachAny

courses.name: 第二次世界大战（亚太战场）
courses.subject: history
courses.description: Explore the Asia-Pacific theater of WWII from Pearl Harbor to surrender.
courses.description_zh: 了解第二次世界大战亚太战场的主要进程，认识反法西斯战争胜利的历史意义。
courses.author: TeachAny

courses.name: 联合国与战后国际秩序
courses.name_en: United Nations and Post-War International Order
courses.subject: history
courses.description: Understand why the United Nations was created and how it shapes world order.
courses.description_zh: 了解联合国的成立及战后国际格局，认识国际秩序建立的背景与意义。
courses.author: TeachAny

courses.name: 欧洲科学革命与启蒙运动
courses.name_en: European Scientific Revolution and the Enlightenment
courses.subject: history
courses.description: Explore how Enlightenment ideas ignited modern revolutions.
courses.description_zh: 了解欧洲科学革命和启蒙运动的主要内容，认识启蒙思想对资产阶级革命的影响。
courses.author: TeachAny

courses.name: 古代亚非欧文明
courses.name_en: Ancient Afro-Eurasian Civilizations / River Valley Civilizations
courses.subject: history
courses.description: High school History: Ancient river valley civilizations - Egypt, Babylon, India, China. Interactive Leaflet map, Canvas timeline, AI tutor, TTS audio.
courses.description_zh: 高中历史互动课件：古代亚非欧四大文明——古埃及、古巴比伦、古印度、古中国的起源、发展与比较分析。含互动地图、Canvas 时间轴、AI 学伴、TTS 语音讲解。
courses.author: weponusa

courses.name: 宋元明清：统一多民族国家的形成与演变
courses.subject: history
courses.author: weponusa

courses.name: 原电池：化学能如何变成电能
courses.name_en: Galvanic Cells: From Chemical Energy to Electricity
courses.subject: chemistry
courses.description: Interactive high-school chemistry courseware for galvanic cells.
courses.description_zh: 高中化学原电池互动课件，含 Zn-Cu 模型、盐桥、电势变化、TTS 和视频。
courses.author: TeachAny

courses.name: 洋流：海水如何重塑气候与渔场
courses.name_en: Ocean Currents: How Seawater Shapes Climate and Fisheries
courses.subject: geography
courses.description: Interactive high-school geography courseware for ocean currents.
courses.description_zh: 高中地理洋流互动课件，含世界地图、Canvas 洋流模型、TTS 和视频。
courses.author: TeachAny

courses.name: 工业革命：机器、工厂与世界市场的形成
courses.name_en: Industrial Revolution: Machines, Factories, and the World Market
courses.subject: history
courses.description: Interactive high-school history courseware for the Industrial Revolution.
courses.description_zh: 高中历史工业革命互动课件，含扩散地图、工厂制度模型、TTS 和视频。
courses.author: TeachAny

coursewares.name: 地球的形状与大小
coursewares.subject: geography
coursewares.description: 初中地理七年级上册：地球的形状、大小及人类认识过程
